description.text: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.

de.original: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: (DRAFT) Burgen so weit das Auge reicht! Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

pt.original: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: (DRAFT) Castelos para todo lado! Dois Cubos e uma Base.

fr.original: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: (DRAFT) Des châteaux à perte de vue ! Deux cubes et une base.

es.original: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
(DRAFT) ¡Construye castillos en el aire!
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

ru.original: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: (DRAFT) Castles everywhere! Two Cubes and a Base.
